app.name: Standby-Fan-Patcher
app.short_description: Make your fan stay on while in standby!
app.long_description:
This apps patch IOS by modifying the shared modules responible for going to standby, that means it makes modifications to the NAND. Use this tool AT YOUR OWN RISK!
Credits :
- sdhEmily for creating the icon, thanks a lot :]
